title: Internal Error: ../V3Width.cpp:7688: Node has no type

features.name: parameterized class with type member accessed via null check
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a type member and an extern function in a base class, where the type member is compared to null before a method call

features.name: class inheritance with parameterized base and type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a parameterized class using a type as the parameter

features.name: extern function declaration in base class with method call on type member
features.description: Code should include an extern function declaration in a base class where the function is called on a typed member of a derived class
